retry_reason: Not a wrapper; refcount operation (kfree_skb) is only on error path, not the main function purpose.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to allocate and prepare an skb for MPTCP subflow transmission, including memory scheduling and queue enqueuing via tcp_skb_entail. The kfree_skb call is only a cleanup on allocation failure, not the main refcount purpose.
